role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund (“ETF”) that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the Underlying Security by employing derivatives, namely swap agreements and/or listed options contracts. It is non-diversified.

info.longName: Defiance Daily Target 2x Long KEEL ETF
